command: export AGENT_LOG_DIR=".gitban/agents/planner/logs" && export AGENT_ROLE="planner" && export AGENT_SPRINT_TAG="TTSNATIVE" && export AGENT_CARD_ID="h027ru" && export AGENT_CYCLE="1" && source .gitban/hooks/agent-log.sh && agent_log_init && agent_log_event "read-inbox" '{"file":"TTSNATIVE-h027ru-planner-1.md"}' && echo "logged"
git add .gitban/agents/planner/logs/TTSNATIVE-h027ru-planner-1.jsonl && git status --short | grep -v "^ D .claude/worktrees"

git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore(TTSNATIVE-h027ru): commit card state + agent audit trail (cycle 1 close-out)

Persists the executor cycle 1 gitban card mutations and agent workflow
inbox/log artefacts alongside the profiling log commit (081e4c8) so the
card's reproducible audit trail lives in git on sprint/TTSNATIVE.

- Card: 9/9 checkboxes ticked, executor work log and reviewer log sections
  appended, status in_progress preserved (closeout owned by gvleuv / step 5).
- Agent inboxes: executor-1 (close-out), reviewer-1 (APPROVAL), planner-1
  (1 non-blocking L1 follow-up routed to w3ciyq tracker).
- Agent logs: reviewer-1, router-1, planner-1 JSONL traces.
EOF
)"

git add .gitban/cards/TTSNATIVE-done-P1-feature-step-1-sprint-planning-for-platform-native-tts-backends-h027ru-CAMERON.md .gitban/cards/TTSNATIVE-in_progress-P1-feature-step-1-sprint-planning-for-platform-native-tts-backends-h027ru-CAMERON.md && git status --short | grep -v "^ D .claude/worktrees"

git add .gitban/agents/planner/logs/TTSNATIVE-h027ru-planner-1.jsonl && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore(TTSNATIVE-h027ru): move card to done via complete_card

Renames h027ru from in_progress -> done on disk after gitban complete_card
validated all 9 checkboxes complete. Card is not archived; closeout of the
TTSNATIVE sprint itself is owned by gvleuv (step 5).
EOF
)"
git log --oneline -5 && git status --short | grep -v "^ D .claude/worktrees" | head
